{{Quote|Starlog 3-24-1 from the bridge of the cruiser ''RS Revenge'', Captain Kazan reporting. We are awaiting the return of Captain Han Solo and his first mate, Chewbacca, who are long overdue on a delicate mission to acquire the mystical talisman which has been sought by our forces and by the Empire.|Captain Kazan|<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" />}}
'''Kazan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who [[Captain/Legends|captained]] the ''[[RS Revenge]]'', a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] that served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. While stationed at a hidden [[Ring Base|Alliance base]] at some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Kazan recorded a [[starlog]] journal entry from the cruiser's [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] that described a [[Mission to Panna Prime|mission]] undertaken by several Rebels to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Panna Prime]]. The entry later provided narration for a [[Unidentified Rebel cartoon|cartoon]] created about the [[Standard day/Legends|day's]] events.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Starlog update… Although Boba Fett quickly located the serum for the sleeping virus, we had no idea of his real plan.|Kazan|<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" />}}
[[File:Alliance_Starbird.svg|thumb|left|170px|Kazan served in the Rebel Alliance (logo pictured) during the Galactic Givil War.]]
Kazan, a [[Gender/Legends|male]], was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] during the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|civil war]] with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" /> At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{SW|url=news/the-best-holidays-and-celebrations-in-the-galaxy-everybodys-invited-of-course|text=The Best Holidays and Celebrations in the Galaxy…and Empire Day, Too|int=The Best Holidays and Celebrations in the Galaxy…and Empire Day, Too|nolive=1}} mentions ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' was one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which corresponds to [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] as ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the Battle of Yavin to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. Given that [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca's]] involvement in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] began during the Battle of Yavin, for the events of ''[[The Story of the Faithful Wookiee]]'' to have been portrayed in a cartoon by the time of ''The Star Wars Holiday Special'', they must have taken place between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and 1 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].</ref> he served as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[RS Revenge]]'', which was stationed at an [[Ring Base|Alliance base]] hidden in an [[Unidentified asteroid field (Rebel Alliance base)|asteroid field]]. During Kazan's [[Time/Legends|time]] at the base, the Alliance's [[General/Legends|General]] [[Ristt]] sent the Rebel-allied [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] on a [[Mission to Panna Prime|mission]] to retrieve a mystical artifact known as the [[Talisman (artifact)|Talisman]], which was also sought by agents of the Empire. When the mission took longer than expected, Kazan described the situation in [[starlog]] 3-24-1, an oral journal entry that he recorded from the ''RS Revenge''{{'s}} [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]].<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" />

The smugglers' [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|ship]] was soon located and pursued to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Panna Prime]] by the Rebels [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], who were aided by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] in [[Serum (sleeping virus)|counteracting]] the Talisman's unexpected [[sleeping virus]] side effect. However, Fett escaped after [[Droid/Legends|droids]] C-3PO and R2-D2 discovered that he was secretly working for the Empire. When the details of the mission reached Kazan, he updated his starlog entry with information about Fett before signing off.<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" /> The entry was later used as narration in a [[Unidentified Rebel cartoon|cartoon]] created about the Rebels' adventure on Panna Prime.<ref name="Holiday Special">''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''</ref>

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Captain Kazan, starlog entry 3-24-1, signing off. May the Force be with you.|Kazan|<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" />}}
As a member of the Rebel Alliance, Kazan concluded starlog 3-24-1 with the phrase "[[May the Force be with you/Legends|May the Force be with you]],"<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" /> a traditional [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] saying often used by Rebel officers.<ref name="A New Hope">{{Film|IV}}</ref><ref name="Return of the Jedi">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Captain Kazan's voice provides narration for ''[[The Story of the Faithful Wookiee]]'', a cartoon<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" /> written by [[George Lucas]] and produced by [[Nelvana]] Studios.<ref name="Tooning Out">{{SWArchive|url=movies/saga/20081210.html|text=Tooning Out the "Holiday Special": Nelvana Studios}}</ref> It originally aired on television in [[1978]] as part of ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''. Kazan was voiced by an uncredited actor.<ref name="Holiday Special" /> His lines are not present in the fourth draft of the ''Holiday Special''{{'s}} script, which instead uses dialogue between Ristt and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] to provide context on the Talisman and Han Solo's mission.<ref name="script">{{WebCite|url=http://starwarsholidayspecial.com/text/script.htm|text=The Fourth Draft Script – 09/13/78|work=[[Starwarsholidayspecial.com|The Star Wars Holiday Special]]|archivedate=20101223071504}}</ref>
